title: Indian-Style Crunchy Savory Bites
description: Crispy, savory, and addictive, these Indian-inspired bites are perfect as a snack or appetizer. The combination of spices and crunchy texture will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a bowl, mix together savory, chewy, light, pepper, polish, and romano.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the crispy bites and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
